title: lathyrus bolanderi var. violaceus
intro: Lathyrus bolanderi var. violaceus, also known as the purple pea, is a variety of the Bolander's pea plant, which belongs to the Fabaceae family of flowering plants. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus bolanderi var. violaceus include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and other stress-related disorders, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to possess a range of medicinal properties and health benefits.
